query:
SELECT 
  id,
  LEFT(parsedData, 500) as parsedData_preview
FROM gmailImportLogs
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-05'
AND status = 'success'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT 
  id,
  LEFT(parsedData, 500) as parsedData_preview
FROM gmailImportLogs
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-05'
AND status = 'success'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 1;
